Method: 提出MUSE-Autoskill Agent框架，包含统一的技能生命周期（创建、记忆、管理、评估、优化），并引入技能级记忆以跨任务累积经验。

Result: 在SkillsBench上的实验表明，生命周期管理的技能可提升任务成功率、效率、复用性及跨智能体迁移能力。

Conclusion: 应将技能视为长期存在、具有经验感知且可测试的资产，而非孤立静态的构件。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents rely on reusable skills to solve complex tasks. However, existing skill creation approaches treat skills as isolated and static artifacts, limiting their reusability, reliability, and long-term improvement. We propose MUSE-Autoskill Agent (Memory-Utilizing Skill Evolution), a skill-centric agent framework that lets agents continuously improve their task-solving capability by creating, reusing, and refining skills under a unified lifecycle (creation, memory, management, evaluation, and refinement). Our framework enables agents to create skills on demand, store and reuse them across tasks, organize and select them efficiently, and evaluate them through unit tests and runtime feedback for continuous refinement. We further introduce skill-level memory that accumulates experience for each skill across tasks, enabling more effective reuse and adaptation over time. Experiments on SkillsBench provide initial evidence that lifecycle-managed skills can improve task success, efficiency, reuse, and cross-agent transfer, highlighting the importance of treating skills as long-lived, experience-aware, and testable assets.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [300] [Credit-assigned Policy Gradient for Early Stage Retrieval in Two-stage Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26385)
*Haruka Kiyohara,Mihaela Curmei,Ariel Evnine,Shankar Kalyanaraman,Israel Nir,Ana-Roxana Pop,Nitzan Razin,Sarah Dean,Thorsten Joachims,Udi Weinsberg*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出信用分配策略梯度(CA-PG)方法，通过对包含目标项的所有候选集进行边际化，解决了早期排序器(ESR)在大规模搜索/推荐系统中端到端训练时策略梯度方差爆炸的问题，显著提升了训练稳定性和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模搜索、推荐和RAG系统通常采用两阶段架构(ESR+LSR)，但ESR的端到端训练面临挑战：传统的vanilla策略梯度(V-PG)在候选集较大时因方差爆炸而无法扩展，因为V-PG将梯度传播到候选集的联合概率上，忽略了候选集中每个具体项对奖励的贡献。

Method: 提出信用分配策略梯度(CA-PG)，通过计算目标项被选入任意候选集的边际概率(即对所有包含该目标项的候选集进行边际化)来传播梯度，从而显著降低V-PG的方差，同时保留在合理对齐的LSR策略下学习正确排序的能力。

Result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验表明，CA-PG改善了使用Plackett-Luce模型的ESR的收敛速度和训练稳定性，尤其在候选集规模较大时效果显著。

Conclusion: CA-PG通过信用分配机制解决了大规模候选集场景下ESR端到端训练的方差问题，为两阶段排序系统的联合优化提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Large-scale search, recommendation, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems typically employ a two-stage architecture: an early-stage ranker (ESR) generates a candidate set, which is subsequently re-ranked by a late-stage ranker (LSR). While there are many reinforcement learning (RL) methods for training the LSR, end-to-end training of the ESR has proven challenging. In particular, naive application of "vanilla" policy gradient (V-PG) is not scalable for candidate-set sizes relevant for practical use due to exploding variance. This issue arises because V-PG propagates the gradient to the joint probability of the candidate sets, ignoring the contribution of each specific item in the candidate set to the reward. To mitigate this issue, we propose a novel "credit-assigned" policy gradient (CA-PG), which computes gradients with respect to the probability that the target item is chosen in any candidate set, i.e. marginalizing over all candidate sets that contain it. Our theoretical analysis reveals that CA-PG significantly reduces the variance of V-PG by marginalizing over the specific composition of the candidate set, while preserving the ability to learn the correct ranking of items under a reasonably aligned LSR policy. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate that CA-PG improves the convergence speed and training stability for ESRs utilizing the canonical Plackett-Luce model, especially when the candidate-set size is large.

</details>


### [301] [The 2nd EReL@MIR Workshop on Efficient Representation Learning for Multimodal Information Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26941)
*Junchen Fu,Xuri Ge,Xin Xin,Alexandros Karatzoglou,Ioannis Arapakis,Xi Wang,Qijiong Liu,Qian Li,Joemon M. Jose*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出在MM 2026上组织EReL@MIR研讨会，聚焦多模态基础模型（如Qwen、LLaVA、CLIP）在信息检索中表征学习时的效率瓶颈问题，旨在汇聚学界与业界研究者讨论解决方案、开放挑战及新的效率指标与基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态基础模型参数规模巨大，在训练、部署和推理阶段对信息检索任务的表征学习造成严重的效率瓶颈，阻碍了其实际应用。

Method: 通过组织EReL@MIR研讨会，汇聚学术界与工业界研究者，共同讨论新兴解决方案、开放挑战，并提出新的效率指标与基准。

Result: 该研讨会将于MM 2026举办，已建立官方网站（https://erel-mir.github.io/）。

Conclusion: 该研讨会旨在推动多模态基础模型在信息检索表征学习中的效率问题研究，促进实际应用落地。

Abstract: Multimodal representation learning has attracted increasing attention in AI, driven by the strong performance of large, pretrained multimodal foundation models such as Qwen, LLaVA, and CLIP. These models deliver impressive performance on a range of multimodal information retrieval (MIR) tasks, including web search, cross-modal retrieval, and recommender systems. Yet their massive parameter counts create major efficiency bottlenecks when adapting their representations for IR tasks during training, deployment, and inference. These limitations hinder the practical use of foundation models for representation learning in information retrieval. To address these issues, we propose organizing the EReL@MIR workshop at MM 2026, bringing together researchers from academia and industry to discuss emerging solutions, open challenges, and new efficiency metrics and benchmarks for multimodal IR representation learning in the foundation-model era. The workshop's official website is available at https://erel-mir.github.io/.

</details>


### [302] [Plans for Evaluating Structured Generative Search Summaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26400)
*Tetsuya Sakai,Jina Lee,Hanpei Fang,Young-In Song*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一个评估结构化生成式搜索摘要的框架，该摘要位于自然搜索结果之上，由大语言模型生成，包含概述、章节、标题和引用来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法缺乏针对结构化生成式搜索摘要（包含概述、章节、标题和引用）的系统性评估框架。

Method: 提出一个评估框架，针对大语言模型生成的结构化搜索摘要（包含概述、多个带标题的章节以及引用的来源文档列表）进行评估。

Result: 论文目前处于框架提出阶段，尚未给出具体的实施和评估结果，仅描述了实施和评估的计划。

Conclusion: 该框架旨在系统性地评估结构化生成式搜索摘要的质量，但尚未完成实际验证。

Abstract: We propose a framework for evaluating structured generative search summaries that are placed atop organic web search results. A structured summary, generated by a large language model, typically consists of an overview, several sections with section titles, and a list of source documents that are cited within the summary. We then describe our plans for implementing and evaluating the framework.

</details>


### [303] [Uniboost: Global Coordination with Value Alignment for Fair and Efficient Traffic Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26424)
*Ge Fan,Nan Zhao,Kai Meng,Cong Luo,Yang Fu,Huiping Chu,Jialin Liu,Yuning Jiang,Bo Zheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Uniboost，一个统一流量分配框架，通过后验价值对齐机制和独立线性提升范式，解决推荐系统混排阶段中的耦合分配、分数膨胀和可解释性不足问题。在线A/B测试表明其能提升微观流量分配效率并提供宏观系统迭代指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统混排方法存在三个主要问题：分配计划耦合、分数膨胀以及缺乏可解释性，导致业务目标间的流量分配不够高效和可控。

Method: 提出Uniboost框架，包含两大核心机制：(1) 后验价值对齐机制，将抽象模型分数校准到具有明确业务语义的锚定指标；(2) 独立线性提升范式，解耦复杂加权方案，实现每个计划贡献的精确归因。

Result: 在线A/B测试和数据分析验证了三点：(1) 降低加权分数总权重可减少无意的业务干扰；(2) 事后分析与汇总仪表盘提供宏观指导；(3) 提出的"有效完成分数"可作为可靠的后验指标。

Conclusion: Uniboost在微观层面提升流量分配效率和推荐性能，在宏观层面提供系统迭代指导，为大规模工业推荐系统提供了高效可控的流量调控方案。

Abstract: With the rapid evolution of internet services, recommendation systems have become indispensable. In particular, the blending (re-ranking) stage plays a pivotal role in allocating traffic across diverse business objectives. However, existing approaches often suffer from coupled allocation plans, score inflation, and a lack of interpretability. To address these challenges, we propose Uniboost, a unified traffic allocation framework. Uniboost introduces a posterior value alignment mechanism that calibrates abstract model scores to anchor metrics with explicit business semantics, significantly enhancing interpretability. Furthermore, it employs an independent linear boosting paradigm to decouple complex weighting schemes, enabling precise attribution of each plan's contribution. We validate the effectiveness of Uniboost through online A/B tests and in-depth data analysis, demonstrating three key findings: 1) Reducing the overall weight of weighted scores effectively mitigates unintended business interference, yielding a more efficient micro-level traffic allocation strategy; 2) Post-hoc analyses and aggregated dashboards provide intuitive, macro-level insights that guide the design of the overall traffic allocation mechanism; 3) The proposed "Effective Completion Score" serves as an easily obtainable post-metric that offers a reliable anchor for content recommendation pipelines. Collectively, our experiments show that Uniboost not only improves traffic allocation efficiency and recommendation performance at the micro level but also provides macro-level guidance for system iteration. Thus, this work provides an efficient and controllable traffic regulation solution for large-scale industrial recommendation systems.

</details>


### [304] [Is Position Bias in Dense Retrievers Built In-or Learned from Data?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26578)
*Daegon Yu,SeungYoon Han,Woomyoung Park*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本研究发现稠密检索器存在位置偏差，训练数据中证据的位置分布会显著影响检索结果。通过构造不同位置偏向的训练集，发现偏态分布会使模型偏好对应位置，而位置平衡训练可将位置敏感性降低57-87%，且不影响平均检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前期研究多从架构角度解释稠密检索器的位置偏差，本文则关注训练数据中证据位置分布对检索级偏差方向的影响，试图识别一个可控的关键因素。

Method: 构造合成位置偏向训练集（证据位于文档开头/中间/末尾），微调八种架构不同的预训练模型，对比位置偏态分布与平衡分布下的检索表现，并进行表征级分析。

Result: 偏态训练分布使模型偏好对应位置的证据；位置平衡训练将位置敏感性降低57-87%，在受控设定下保持竞争力；表征分析表明微调可重塑位置偏好，但部分模型仍保留预训练/架构的固有效应。

Conclusion: 训练位置分布是检索级位置偏差的主要可控因素，平衡数据筛选是实用的缓解策略。

Abstract: Dense retrievers exhibit positional bias, favoring documents whose query-relevant information appears near the beginning and degrading retrieval performance when the information appears later. While prior work on positional bias in dense retrievers has largely focused on architectural explanations, we study how the positional distribution of evidence in training data affects retrieval-level bias direction. To test this, we construct synthetic position-targeted training sets in which query-relevant evidence appears at the beginning, middle, or end of documents, and fine-tune eight architecturally diverse pretrained models under position-skewed and balanced training distributions. At the ranking level, we observe a strong directional pattern across the examined models: skewed training distributions favor evidence at the corresponding positions. Position-balanced training reduces positional sensitivity by 57--87\% on position-aware benchmarks, with competitive mean retrieval performance in our controlled setting. Representation-level analyses further suggest that fine-tuning often reshapes learned positional preferences, although pre-existing architectural or pretraining-specific tendencies persist in some models. These results identify training-position distribution as a major controllable factor in retrieval-level position bias and suggest balanced data curation as a practical mitigation strategy.

</details>


### [305] [L2Rec: Towards Dual-View Understanding of LLMs for Personalized Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26717)
*Pingjun Pan,Tingting Zhou,Peiyao Lu,Tingting Fei,Hongxiang Chen,Chuanjiang Luo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: L2Rec通过双视角个性化混合专家机制（DPMoE）在LLM参数层面统一行为与语义信号，实现个性化推荐，显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在输入或输出层整合行为与语义信号存在分布差异或缺乏端到端监督的问题，亟需更统一的融合方式。

Method: 提出DPMoE机制，在Transformer参数层面为每个用户施加视角特定的个性化低秩扰动，并通过自适应跨视角融合模块整合双视角输出。

Result: 在四个数据集上超越SOTA基线，工业级在线A/B测试验证了关键参与指标的显著提升。

Conclusion: 参数层面的双视角统一融合是提升LLM个性化推荐效果的有效途径。

Abstract: Adapting large language models (LLMs) for personalized recommendation requires aligning their general-purpose capabilities with user-specific preferences while effectively leveraging both behavioral and semantic signals. Existing approaches typically integrate these signals at either the input level (e.g., injecting behavioral embeddings into the token space) or the output level (e.g., contrastive alignment of separate encoders), suffering from distribution gaps or lack of end-to-end task supervision. In this work, we introduce L2Rec, which unifies behavioral and semantic understanding at the parameter level of LLMs. Our key insight is that the same set of Transformer parameters can serve as a shared medium for both views: by applying view-specific, personalized low-rank perturbations via a Dual-view Personalized Mixture-of-Experts (DPMoE) mechanism, L2Rec enables a single LLM backbone to produce complementary behavioral and semantic adaptations for each user with minimal representation-level misalignment. An adaptive cross-view fusion module further integrates the dual-view outputs into a unified user preference. Experiments on four datasets show that L2Rec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, and online A/B testing on a large-scale industrial platform validates significant improvements in key engagement metrics.

</details>


### [306] [RAGEAR: Retrieval-Augmented Graph-Enhanced Academic Recommender](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26819)
*Francesco Granata,Lorenzo Lamazzi,Misael Mongiovì,Francesco Poggi,Valeria Secchini*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: RAGEAR是一个神经符号推荐系统，结合密集检索和知识图谱进行学术课程推荐。它从完整的讲座转录中检索内容，并通过知识图谱支持基于学分、学科、学习计划和先修课程等约束的符号过滤。核心贡献是一种图感知聚合函数，将片段级证据传播到课程级推荐。实验表明，利用讲座转录优于仅基于元数据的检索，且RAGEAR进一步提升了排序质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学术课程推荐系统多依赖元数据（如课程标题、描述），忽视了讲座转录中细粒度教学内容的语义价值，难以捕捉学生查询与课程内容之间的深层对齐。

Method: RAGEAR结合密集检索（从讲座转录中检索语义对齐的片段）和符号知识图谱（建模课程、讲座、转录片段、学分、学习计划等）。核心创新是图感知聚合函数，综合三个因素：课程相关的检索相似度占比、相关片段的排序强度、以及跨讲座的证据分布，将片段级证据聚合为课程级推荐分数。

Result: 在152个学生类查询上，通过人工评估和大规模LLM相关性评估，实验显示：1) 基于讲座转录的检索优于仅元数据检索；2) RAGEAR在排序质量上进一步优于基于转录的归一化SumP基线，尤其在Top排名推荐上提升显著。

Conclusion: RAGEAR证明了融合细粒度教学内容和结构化知识图谱在学术课程推荐中的有效性，展示了神经符号方法在信息检索与推荐系统中的潜力。

Abstract: We present RAGEAR (Retrieval-Augmented Graph-Enhanced Academic Recommender), a neurosymbolic recommender system for academic course recommendation. RAGEAR combines dense retrieval over full lecture transcripts with a symbolic Knowledge Graph modelling courses, lessons, transcript chunks, credits, study plans, and curricular information. The Knowledge Graph supports symbolic filtering and contextualisation based on structured constraints, such as credits, academic disciplines, study plans, and prerequisites. Unlike metadata-based approaches, it exploits fine-grained instructional content by retrieving transcript chunks semantically aligned with a student's query. The main contribution is a graph-aware aggregation function that propagates chunk-level evidence to course-level recommendations. The score combines three factors: the share of retrieved similarity associated with a course, the rank-based strength of its relevant chunks, and the distribution of evidence across lessons. We evaluate RAGEAR on 152 student-like queries through a human evaluation sample and a large-scale LLM-based relevance assessment. Results show that lecture transcripts improve over metadata-only retrieval, and that RAGEAR further improves ranking quality over a transcript-based normalized SumP baseline, especially for top-ranked recommendations.

</details>


### [307] [ICICLE: Expanding Retrieval with In-Context Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26902)
*Yu-Chen Den,Yung-Yu Shih,Zhi Rui Tam,Kuan-Yu Chen,Pu-Jen Cheng,Yun-Nung Chen,Eugene Yang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ICICLE提出将增量生成式检索视为上下文检索问题，通过推理时提供的新文档-文档ID证据来避免重训练和灾难性遗忘，并在MS MARCO和NQ320K上取得良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式检索（GR）将查询直接映射到文档ID，但新增文档时需要重训练模型参数，导致成本高且存在灾难性遗忘问题。

Method: 提出ICICLE框架，将增量GR转化为上下文检索问题，包含基于[COPY]的路由机制、偏好校准和大上下文适配，以区分上下文检索与参数检索。

Result: 在MS MARCO和NQ320K上，ICICLE提升了新文档的检索能力，同时保持了对已见文档的检索性能，无需语料库特定重训练。

Conclusion: 高shot退化主要由路由失败导致，源选择校准是扩展上下文生成式检索的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: Generative retrieval (GR) maps queries directly to document identifiers (docids) using parametric knowledge, However, this design makes corpus expansion costly: adding new documents requires updating model parameters to encode new document-docid associations incurs repeated training and catastrophic forgetting of previously indexed documents. In this work, we revisit incremental GR as an in-context retrieval problem, where newly added documents are supplied as inference-time document-docid evidence. We propose ICICLE, an in-context indexing framework that performs source-aware docid generation over both parametric memory and context-provided document-docid pairs. ICICLE combines a `[COPY]`-based routing mechanism, preference-based calibration, and large context adaptation to distinguish context-grounded retrieval from parametric retrieval. Experiments on MS MARCO and NQ320K show that ICICLE improves retrieval of newly introduced documents while preserving seen-document retention without corpus-specific retraining. Our analysis further shows that high-shot degradation is mainly caused by routing failure, highlighting source-selection calibration as a key bottleneck for scaling in-context generative retrieval.

</details>


### [308] [MuChator: Enabling Active Music Discovery via Conversational Music LLMs in Douyin Music](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27103)
*Jiahao Liang,Linzhi Huang,Xuannan Liu,Xukai Wang,Xuanpu Luo,Yongchun Zhu,Jingwu Chen,Feng Zhang,Xiao Yang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MuChator 是一个基于 MusicLLM 的交互式音乐推荐框架，通过音乐知识预训练、上下文感知指令微调和基于混合奖励模型的偏好对齐，让用户能用自然语言表达情境化音乐意图，已在抖音音乐 App 部署并提升 46.49% 用户活跃天数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前沉浸式 feed 音乐发现范式限制了用户主动表达听歌意图，而传统的搜索方式对模糊、情境化、口语化的音乐需求支持不足。虽然 LLM 能实现自然语言交互，但直接应用存在音乐领域知识不足、缺乏音乐-查询协同推理、对个性化偏好理解浅等问题。

Method: (1) 音乐知识预训练：三阶段方案逐步注入客观音乐知识、主观音乐知识和个性化偏好；(2) 上下文感知指令微调：通过自动化合成流水线构建高质量的 用户-查询-音乐 三元组；(3) 基于混合奖励模型（Hybrid RM）的偏好对齐：联合建模意图相关性、个性化偏好和基本约束，使用 GRPO 强化学习优化。

Result: 在工业级音乐推荐数据集上超越 Gemini-3-Pro 等领先专有模型，在线 A/B 测试中用户活跃天数提升 46.49%。

Conclusion: MuChator 有效解决了情境化、口语化音乐意图表达与推荐的问题，验证了 MusicLLM 框架在工业场景中的可行性和显著效果。

Abstract: Douyin Music, a large-scale platform with millions of daily users, adopts an immersive, feed-based discovery paradigm, where users passively explore music through continuous recommendations. While effective for passive music discovery, this paradigm restricts users to recommendation results and provides limited support for explicitly specifying listening intents. Unlike conventional search, where users express well-defined intents through explicit queries such as specific songs or artists, real-world active music discovery is often situational and colloquial, involving vague or underspecified requests. While LLMs enable natural language interaction, their direct use in music discovery remains limited by insufficient music-domain knowledge, lack of music-query collaborative reasoning, and shallow understanding of personalized preferences. To address these challenges, we introduce MuChator, an interactive MusicLLM-based framework that enables users to actively express situational music intents in natural language. MuChator incorporates three key components: (1) Music Knowledge Pre-training, a three-stage scheme that incrementally injects objective music knowledge, subjective music knowledge, and personalized music preferences into LLMs; (2) Context-aware Instruction Tuning, which constructs high-quality user-query-music triplets through an automated synthesis pipeline to align LLMs with active and situational user intents; and (3) Preference Alignment with Hybrid RM, which jointly models intent relevance, personalized preferences, and basic constraints, and is optimized using GRPO-based reinforcement learning. Extensive evaluations on industrial music recommendation datasets demonstrate that MuChator outperforms leading proprietary models, such as Gemini-3-Pro. The model has been deployed on Douyin Music App within ByteDance, with 46.49\% improvement of user active days in online A/B test.

</details>


### [309] [Lost in the Evidence? Reproducing Document Position and Context Size Effects in RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27105)
*Jorge Gabín,Anxo Perez,Javier Parapar*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文系统性地复现并扩展了RAG系统中文档排序和上下文大小影响的研究，发现主题采样是主要方差来源，并提供了校准流程；在真实检索场景下，发现理想化设置得出的结论未必适用于实际RAG流水线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前关于RAG中位置效应（如"lost in the middle"）的研究结果不一致且难以复现，缺乏系统性的评估框架来验证这些现象在当代LLM上的表现及向真实RAG场景的迁移性。

Method: 通过重复子集采样进行主题预算校准以稳定趋势；在受控框架下复现位置敏感性实验；引入真实检索器替代oracle文档进行研究，分析检索顺序、上下文大小与检索质量的交互作用。

Result: 主题采样是主要方差来源，小主题集可能掩盖或夸大排序效应；检索顺序和上下文大小与检索质量、模型选择存在强烈交互作用；理想化设置的结论不一定迁移到真实RAG流水线。

Conclusion: 需要标准化的RAG评估协议，关注主题覆盖等实验设计细节；实际应用场景下的评估更重要，不能仅依赖理想化设置的结果。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems rely on retrieved documents being concatenated into a model's input context, making both document ordering and context size critical yet controversial design choices. Prior work reports position-based effects such as lost in the middle and related long-context phenomena. However, empirical findings remain inconsistent and hard to reproduce across models, datasets, and evaluation protocols. In this paper, we present a systematic reproducibility study that revisits these claims and examines how they evolve with contemporary LLMs under a controlled evaluation framework. We first show that topic sampling is a major source of variance: small topic sets can mask or exaggerate ordering effects. Based on repeated subset sampling across multiple topic budgets, we provide a practical calibration procedure that identifies topic counts yielding stable trends at feasible cost. Using these fixed topic sets, we then reproduce and extend results on position sensitivity, re-evaluating lost in the middle and positional biases in modern LLMs. Then, we also study a more realistic RAG scenario in which relevance is mediated by a retriever rather than oracle access to ground-truth documents. In this setting, we re-examine a recent industry study and identify discrepancies to evaluation choices such as limited topic coverage and reliance on LLM-based judges. Finally, we conduct an analysis of how retrieval order and context size affect downstream LLM performance under imperfect retrieval. Our results demonstrate that both factors interact strongly with retrieval quality and model choice, and that conclusions drawn from idealised setups do not always transfer to real-world RAG pipelines. We release all code and configurations to support reproducibility and future work on robust RAG evaluation.

</details>


### [310] [Rethinking Agentic RAG: Toward LLM-Driven Logical Retrieval Beyond Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27123)
*Yuqi Zeng,Qixiang Deng,Yulei Wan,Ruiquan Jiang,Xiaoqing Zheng,Xuanjing Huang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级代理RAG框架，让LLM通过逻辑表达式控制检索过程，使用倒排索引代替复杂的混合检索后端，在降低构建和服务成本的同时，达到了强基线性能，并减少了生成中的幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前代理RAG系统过度关注构建复杂的检索后端（如稠密、混合、图检索），而忽略了让LLM更好地主导检索过程。作者认为应该赋予LLM更多控制权，简化检索接口。

Method: 提出一个代理RAG框架，让LLM使用逻辑表达式（结构化查询）来表达检索意图，并将检索后端简化为基于倒排索引的系统，实现轻量级但精细控制的检索接口。

Result: 该框架在性能上与强大的混合检索基线持平，同时大幅降低了构建和服务成本；并且基于逻辑查询的检索过程显著减少了生成响应中的幻觉。

Conclusion: 代理RAG应将更多控制权交给LLM来引导检索过程，依赖轻量级检索接口即可实现高效能，不需要复杂的检索后端架构。

Abstract: Recent advances in RAG have shifted toward an agentic paradigm, where LLMs interact with retrieval systems over multiple turns and iteratively refine queries based on intermediate results. At the same time, LLMs have demonstrated a strong ability to construct structured queries that precisely express their information needs. However, contemporary RAG systems remain heavily focused on engineering complex retrieval backends, including dense, hybrid, and graph-based retrieval architectures. In this study, we argue that agentic RAG should delegate greater control to the LLM to steer the retrieval process, while relying on a lightweight retrieval interface that provides fine-grained control and faithfully executes the LLM's structured intent. Guided by this principle, we propose an agentic RAG framework that enables LLMs to formulate retrieval intents using logical expressions while simplifying the retrieval backend to an inverted-index-based system. Extensive experiments show that our framework matches a strong agentic hybrid baseline, while substantially reducing construction and serving cost. Moreover, we show that anchoring the retrieval process in logical queries substantially reduces hallucinations in generated responses.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [311] [Reproducibility Companion Paper: Swarical: An Integrated Hierarchical Approach to Localizing Flying Light Specks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26313)
*Hamed Alimohammadzadeh,Shahram Ghandeharizadeh,Federico Cunico,Joshua Springer*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提供了ACM Multimedia 2024论文"Swarical: An Integrated Hierarchical Approach to Localizing Flying Light Specks"的复现指南，包括离线规划器和在线定位技术，旨在让微型无人机FLS准确高效地定位并照亮复杂2D/3D形状。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现微型无人机（Flying Light Specks）对复杂2D和3D形状的精准、高效定位与照明，并确保实验结果可复现。

Method: 提出Swarical层次化定位技术，包含两个组件：离线规划器（根据FLS传感器规格将网格文件转换为FLS集群）和在线定位技术（在FLS上执行快速高精度定位），部分FLS作为暗标点仅用于定位。

Result: 在线定位技术被报告为快速且高度准确，本文提供实验复现的配套材料和说明。

Conclusion: 本文作为companion paper，旨在帮助研究者复现Swarical的定位实验结果，验证其高效性和准确性。

Abstract: This companion paper provides artifacts and instructions on replicating the experiments in the ACM Multimedia 2024 paper entitled "Swarical: An Integrated Hierarchical Approach to Localizing Flying Light Specks." Swarm-based hierarchical, Swarical, is a localization technique that enables miniature drones, Flying Light Specks (FLSs), to accurately and efficiently localize and illuminate complex 2D and 3D shapes. It consists of two components, an offline planner and an online localization technique that executes on an FLS. The offline planner uses the FLS sensor specification for positioning to convert mesh files into swarms of FLSs. Some FLSs are dark and used only for localization. We reported the online localization technique to be fast and highly accurate. We describe how to reproduce this finding using our artifacts.

</details>


### [312] [Can We Hear from Events? Generating Speech from Event Camera](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26672)
*Jingping Fang,Lin Chen,Chenyang Xu,Tong Zhao,Weidong Cai,Xiaoming Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出EventSpeech框架，利用神经形态事件（微秒级精度）解决传统RGB语音生成中时间粒度不匹配问题，通过事件编码器、层级小波上下文器（HWC）和双向对齐机制，配合专用基准EVT-SPK，在细粒度情感保留和运动模糊抵抗上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RGB语音生成因固定相机曝光时间模糊了高频发音瞬态，导致时间粒度不匹配，无法渲染富有表现力的情感语音。

Method: EventSpeech框架：1) 专用事件编码器建模稀疏神经形态事件；2) 多尺度音频编码器含层级小波上下文器（HWC）；3) 双向对齐机制同步语言内容、视觉动态与密集声学特征。

Result: 在构建的EVT-SPK基准（含大规模合成数据和真实神经形态硬件录制数据）上，EventSpeech显著优于现有基线，能保留细粒度情感并抵抗运动模糊。

Conclusion: EventSpeech开创了神经形态事件在表达性语音生成中的应用，建立了多模态语音生成的新范式。

Abstract: Traditional RGB-based speech generation faces Temporal Granularity Mismatch since fixed camera exposure times inevitably blur the high-frequency articulatory transients essential for rendering emotional speech. To break this ceiling, we propose EventSpeech as a novel text-conditioned framework pioneering the use of neuromorphic events for expressive speech generation, since these microsecond-precise events naturally align with acoustic waveform dynamics. Our architecture integrates a dedicated Event Encoder to model sparse neuromorphic events alongside a multi-scale Audio Encoder featuring a Hierarchical Wavelet Contextualizer (HWC). A bidirectional alignment mechanism seamlessly synchronizes linguistic content and visual dynamics with dense acoustic features. Furthermore, we construct EVT-SPK as the first benchmark comprising large-scale synthetic data and real-world recordings from specialized neuromorphic hardware. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that EventSpeech significantly outperforms current baselines by preserving fine-grained emotions and resisting motion blur to establish a new paradigm for multimodal speech generation. Code and demo are available at https://xrfang-0102.github.io/EventSpeechWeb/.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [313] [GEM: Geometric Entropy Mixing for Optimal LLM Data Curation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26121)
*Yue Min,Ziyun Qiao,Ruining Chen,Yujun Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEM提出了一种基于几何熵的框架，将数据配比问题重新表述为超球面上的变分问题，通过MM算法解耦生成先验、对抗聚类坍缩，并利用师生蒸馏扩展到Web规模，在1.1B参数模型上实现了1.2%的下游准确率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据配比方法受限于分类缺陷：人工分类存在本体论错位，欧几里得聚类无法处理嵌入各向异性，导致最优混合难以实现。

Method: 1) 将数据配比建模为超球面上的变分问题，加入混合平衡正则化器；2) 通过MM(Minorize-Maximize)算法解耦生成先验并优化目标；3) 采用师生蒸馏将几何保真度扩展到Web规模数据；4) 引入几何影响分数(GIS)用于可解释的类别生成。

Result: 在1.1B参数模型上，GEM集成到DoReMi和RegMix等混合策略中，平均下游准确率提升高达1.2%，建立了新的SOTA，并提供稳健的坐标系统支持可预测的数据混合。

Conclusion: GEM通过几何熵框架有效发现了欧几里得启发式方法无法察觉的平衡语义结构，为数据配比提供了一种更稳健、可预测的方法。

Abstract: LLM pre-training efficacy increasingly depends on data composition rather than sheer volume. Yet, optimal mixing is hindered by categorization flaws: human taxonomies suffer from ontological misalignment, and Euclidean clustering fails to address embedding anisotropy. We introduce GEM (Geometric Entropy Mixing), a framework reformulating data curation as a variational problem on the hypersphere augmented with a mixing-balance regularizer. By decoupling the generative prior and optimizing the objective via a provable MM (Minorize-Maximize) algorithm, GEM effectively counteracts the cluster collapse to discover balanced semantic structures invisible to Euclidean heuristics. We employ teacher-student distillation to scale this geometric fidelity to web-scale corpora and introduce the Geometric Influence Score (GIS) for interpretable taxonomy generation. Experiments with 1.1B-parameter models demonstrate that GEM establishes a new state-of-the-art when integrated into mixing strategies like DoReMi and RegMix, improving average downstream accuracy by up to 1.2% and offering a robust coordinate system for predictable data mixing.

</details>


### [314] [Unified Neural Scaling Laws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26248)
*Ethan Caballero,Priyank Jaini,David Krueger,Irina Rish*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出统一神经缩放定律（UNSL），能同时建模和预测深度神经网络在多个维度（参数量、数据量、训练步数、推理步数、计算量、超参数）变化时的缩放行为，在视觉、语言、数学、强化学习等任务上比现有形式更准确。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经缩放定律通常只考虑单一维度（如仅参数量或仅数据量）的缩放行为，缺乏统一形式来同时建模多个维度共同变化时的规律，导致预测精度不足。

Method: 提出一种函数形式（UNSL），能同时拟合和推断模型参数量、训练数据规模、训练步数、推理步数、计算量、超参数等多个维度共同变化时的评估指标缩放行为。

Result: 在视觉、语言、数学、强化学习等多种上游和下游任务上，UNSL的缩放行为外推准确度显著优于其他神经缩放定律函数形式。

Conclusion: UNSL是一种更准确、更具通用性的神经缩放定律形式，适用于多种架构和任务类型，能够更好地指导大规模模型训练中的资源配置。

Abstract: We present a functional form (that we refer to as a Unified Neural Scaling Law (UNSL)) that accurately models and extrapolates the scaling behaviors of deep neural networks as multiple dimensions all vary simultaneously (i.e. how the evaluation metric of interest varies as one simultaneously varies the number of model parameters, training dataset size, number of training steps, number of inference steps, amount of compute, and various hyperparameters) for various architectures and for each of various tasks within a varied set of upstream and downstream tasks. This set includes large-scale vision, language, math, and reinforcement learning. When compared to other functional forms for neural scaling, this functional form yields extrapolations of scaling behavior that are considerably more accurate on this set.

</details>


### [315] [The Constraint Tax: Measuring Validity-Correctness Tradeoffs in Structured Outputs for Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26128)
*Jaideep Ray*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，对小型语言模型（<3B参数）施加结构化输出约束虽然能提升格式规范度，但会显著降低答案正确性，并提出了"约束代价"（constraint tax）测量方法，建议采用"先自由推理，后约束封装"的设计模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业界常假设硬性输出约束（如JSON Schema、工具调用格式）能提升可靠性且不影响答案质量。本文质疑这一假设对小型语言模型（sub-3B）是否成立，旨在量化约束带来的准确性损失。

Method: 提出了"约束代价"（constraint tax）测量协议，在固定模型、任务分布和问题实例下，隔离结构化输出约束造成的答案准确率和可执行准确率损失。实验使用Qwen2.5-0.5B、Qwen2.5-1.5B、SmolLM2-1.7B，在15,000次生成上对比无约束与硬约束解码的效果。

Result: 硬约束使schema合规率从61.5%提升至100.0%，但答案准确率从19.7%降至11.0%，错误合规输出从49.5%升至88.9%。在日历工具调用任务中，Qwen2.5-1.5B在prompt-only JSON下可执行准确率为91.5%，硬约束下仅48.0%。3B边界模型仍存在约束代价。

Conclusion: 结构化约束对小型语言模型存在显著的语义层面准确性代价，不能简单假设"约束不影响答案"。建议生产系统分别报告schema合规率、答案准确率、可执行准确率和错误合规率，并采用"先自由推理，后约束封装"的设计模式。

Abstract: Production LLM systems increasingly require machine-readable outputs: JSON objects, typed traces, regex-constrained fields, and tool-call schemas. This paper targets on-device and low-cost small language model (SLM) deployments, where sub-3B models are attractive for privacy, latency, and commodity hardware but have limited capacity to satisfy schemas while solving tasks. The usual engineering assumption is that hard output constraints improve reliability without changing the underlying answer. We show that this assumption is unsafe for small models. We introduce \emph{constraint tax}, a measurement protocol for isolating the answer and executable-accuracy loss caused by structured-output constraints at fixed model, fixed task distribution, and fixed problem instances. Across 15,000 commodity-GPU generations with Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B, hard answer-only schema decoding raises schema validity from 61.5\% to 100.0\%, but lowers answer accuracy from 19.7\% to 11.0\% and increases wrong-valid-schema outputs from 49.5\% to 88.9\%. The strongest industry analogue is a deterministic calendar tool-call task: Qwen2.5-1.5B achieves 91.5\% executable accuracy with prompt-only JSON but only 48.0\% under the same hard tool-call schema, while both modes are 100.0\% schema-valid. The error is semantic, not structural. We also show that the 3B boundary still pays a direct-schema tax and that delayed packaging supports a constructive design pattern: reason free, constrain late. The practical conclusion is direct: production systems should report schema validity, answer accuracy, executable accuracy, and wrong-valid-schema rate separately.

</details>


### [316] [AirCast-SR: A Foundation Model for Kilometer-Scale Atmospheric Super-Resolution via Latent Consistency Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26130)
*Somnath Luitel,Manmeet Singh,Joshua Durkee,Abdullah Al Fahad,Naveen Sudharsan,Prabhjot Singh,Cenlin He,Harsh Kamath,Zong-Liang Yang,Krishnagopal Halder,Sandeep Juneja,Parthasarathi Mukhopadhyay,Saptarishi Dhanuka,Amit Kumar Srivastava*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 AirCast-SR（实为 EarthMind-SR），一个基于潜一致性模型（LCM）扩散框架的3D U-Net大气超分辨率基础模型，可将全球AI天气预报从0.25度（~28 km）降尺度至1 km/小时的精细分辨率，在CONUS区域训练后在印度和德国实现零样本全球迁移，为公里级AI天气预测建立新范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值天气预报（NWP）在公里级分辨率上计算成本过高，限制了能源、农业和灾害管理等应用对精细时空细节的获取，亟需一种计算高效的超分辨率方法。

Method: 采用三维U-Net架构，嵌入潜一致性模型（LCM）扩散框架；以GraphCast预报为输入、NOAA的AORC数据为目标，在CONUS区域进行基于图块的样本训练；实现8个耦合地表变量同时预测。

Result: 所有变量和预报时长均达到近零偏差；径向功率谱密度分析显示在10-100 km波长范围内保留了精细大气结构；在CONUS三个季节案例中验证有效，并在印度和德国实现零样本全局迁移。

Conclusion: EarthMind-SR作为开放权重的基础模型，建立了公里级AI天气预报的新范式，为区域微调、知识蒸馏及气候服务与灾害预报等下游应用提供了平台。

Abstract: Operational weather prediction at kilometer scales remains computationally prohibitive for traditional numerical weather prediction (NWP) models, limiting forecast access for applications in energy, agriculture, and disaster management that require fine-grained spatiotemporal detail. Here we introduce AirCast-SR, a foundation model for atmospheric super-resolution that downscales global AI weather forecasts from 0.25 degree (~28 km) to 1 km horizontal resolution at hourly temporal resolution, producing 67-hour forecasts of eight coupled surface variables simultaneously. EarthMind-SR employs a three-dimensional U-Net conditioned within a Latent Consistency Model (LCM) diffusion framework, trained on patch-based samples over the contiguous United States (CONUS) using GraphCast forecasts as input and NOAA's Analysis of Record for Calibration (AORC) as the target. The model achieves near-zero bias across all variables and lead times, and its radial power spectral density analysis demonstrates preservation of fine-scale atmospheric structure at wavelengths of 10 km to 100 km where coarser models lose spectral power. We validate EarthMind-SR across three CONUS case studies spanning winter, summer, and spring seasons, and demonstrate zero-shot global transferability over India and Germany using independent surface station observations without any retraining or fine-tuning. As an open-weights foundation model, EarthMind-SR establishes a new paradigm for kilometer-scale AI weather prediction and provides a platform for regional fine-tuning, distillation, and downstream applications in climate services and hazard forecasting.

</details>


### [317] [SilIF: Silhouette-Augmented Isolation Forest for Unsupervised Transaction Fraud Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26135)
*Venkatakrishnan Gopalakrishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SilIF，在孤立森林基础上增加基于轮廓系数的评分层，提升无监督异常检测性能，并在IEEE-CIS欺诈检测基准上取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无监督异常检测在欺诈检测中广泛应用，但传统孤立森林方法未能充分利用树结构中的信息来区分异常点与正常点。

Method: 提取每个样本在各棵树上的路径长度向量（指纹），聚类形成结构分组，计算轮廓系数衡量样本与所属组及最近邻组的匹配程度，通过超参数alpha将轮廓信号与基础IF得分结合。

Result: 在IEEE-CIS基准（59万交易，3.5%欺诈率）上，SilIF（alpha=1.0）平均AUC-PR提升0.0080，五个种子全胜（p=0.046）；在Sparkov合成数据上无改进。

Conclusion: SilIF是孤立森林的一种可调、易部署的增强方法，论文诚实报告了在哪些条件下有效、哪些条件下无效。

Abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection is widely used in transaction fraud detection where labels are scarce. Isolation Forest (IF) is among the most popular classical methods due to its scalability and ease of deployment. We propose SilIF, an augmentation of Isolation Forest that adds a silhouette-based scoring layer computed in a representation space induced by the trees of the forest. For each point, we extract a vector of per-tree path lengths, cluster these "fingerprints" into structural groups, and compute a silhouette score that measures how well the point fits its assigned group versus the nearest alternative. The silhouette signal is combined with the base IF score via a single hyperparameter alpha. On the IEEE-CIS Fraud Detection benchmark (~590K transactions, 3.5% fraud), SilIF with alpha=1.0 improves over plain Isolation Forest by +0.0080 AUC-PR on average across five seeds, with SilIF winning on all five seeds (paired t-test p=0.046). We also report results on a synthetic credit-card dataset (Sparkov) where the silhouette augmentation does not improve over plain IF, and we characterize the conditions that distinguish the two outcomes. The paper presents SilIF as a tunable, easy-to-deploy enhancement to Isolation Forest with honest reporting of when it helps and when it does not. Code at https://github.com/venkat15vk/silif-anomaly-detection.

</details>


### [318] [Neural Bayesian Sequential Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26147)
*Yongchao Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经贝叶斯顺序路由（NBSR），将神经网络推理建模为在层次化有向无环图（DAG）上的主动证据累积过程，利用Dirichlet-Categorical共轭框架实现不确定性感知、早期退出和资源理性推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经网络采用静态密集前向计算，缺乏证据获取过程、不确定性演化机制以及自适应停止决策能力，无法模拟人类序贯且具有不确定性意识的决策方式。

Method: 构建Dirichlet-Categorical共轭框架，神经专家从持久全局知识库中提取正证据向量作为伪计数，通过精确共轭加法更新Dirichlet信念状态；结合Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through估计器实现硬路径依赖路由的同时保留代理梯度以支持端到端训练。

Result: 在视觉分类、结构化医学诊断、语言建模、部分可观测控制及成本感知贝叶斯实验设计等任务上，NBSR在保持竞争性预测性能的同时，提供了可解释的路由轨迹、路径依赖的证据归因、不确定性感知的决策控制及资源理性推理。

Conclusion: NBSR为可解释、模块化且资源理性的智能体AI提供了数学上严谨的推理框架。

Abstract: Human decision-making is sequential and uncertainty-aware, yet standard neural networks often rely on static, dense forward computation with limited visibility into evidence acquisition, uncertainty evolution, or when computation should stop. We introduce \textbf{Neural Bayesian Sequential Routing (NBSR)}, a framework that models neural inference as active evidence accumulation over a hierarchical Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG). Within a Dirichlet--Categorical conjugate framework, neural experts query a persistent global knowledge oracle to extract positive evidence vectors, which act as pseudo-counts and update a Dirichlet belief state by exact conjugate addition. Coupled with a Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through estimator, this update enables hard, path-dependent routing while preserving surrogate gradients for end-to-end training. The resulting Dirichlet precision and entropy provide mechanisms for uncertainty quantification, entropy-based early exiting, OOD abstention, and cost-aware evidence acquisition. We prove that, under strictly positive evidence extraction, total Dirichlet precision increases monotonically along any valid trajectory and marginal predictive variance is bounded, formalizing sequential ``hypothesis sharpening''; under idealized capacity and optimization assumptions, the terminal Dirichlet expectation recovers the Bayes-optimal conditional distribution. Empirical evaluations across visual categorization, structured medical diagnosis, language modeling, partially observable control, and cost-aware Bayesian experimental design show that NBSR achieves competitive predictive performance while providing transparent routing traces, path-dependent evidence attribution, uncertainty-aware decision control, and resource-rational inference. Overall, NBSR offers a mathematically grounded framework for interpretable, modular, and resource-rational agentic AI.

</details>


### [319] [TSFMAudit: Data Contamination Auditing in Forecasting Time Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26161)
*Hongkai Li,Shifeng Xie,Lefei Shen,Zhuo Li,Mouxiang Chen,Xiaobin Zhang,Han Fu,Jianling Sun,Xiaoxue Ren,Chenghao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次研究时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）的预训练污染审计问题，提出基于探针适应动力学的TSFMAudit方法，通过检测异常高效的微调适应来识别污染数据集，在6个模型和187个数据集上验证优于10个基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列基础模型在大规模语料上预训练，评估数据集可能已被污染（暴露在预训练中），导致性能估计过于乐观。现有审计方法难以处理连续、异构的时间序列信号且缺乏语料文档，因此需要专门针对TSFMs的预训练污染审计方法。

Method: 提出TSFMAudit方法，基于探针适应动力学（probe adaptation dynamics）：受污染数据集在微调探针后表现出更快的损失降低和更小的骨干网络参数移动，即异常高效的适应行为。

Result: 在6个TSFMs和187个数据集上评估，使用文档化的训练来源证据作为监督，与10个来自LLM文献的竞争基线方法相比，TSFMAudit表现更优。

Conclusion: TSFMAudit能有效检测时间序列基础模型的预训练数据污染，填补了该领域的研究空白，为后续TSFMs的评估可信度提供了重要保障。

Abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) are increasingly pretrained on large corpora, raising concerns that evaluation datasets may have been exposed during pretraining and thus yield overly optimistic performance estimates. Auditing such contamination is challenging in time series because signals are continuous and heterogeneous, and often lack corpus documentation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to study pretraining contamination auditing for TSFMs. We formalize the problem of pretraining contamination auditing for TSFMs and propose TSFMAudit, a method based on probe adaptation dynamics. Our key intuition is that contamination manifests as unusually efficient adaptation: after a fine tuning probe, contaminated datasets tend to exhibit faster loss reduction with smaller backbone movement. We evaluate TSFMAudit on 6 TSFMs and 187 datasets using documented training source evidence as supervision, and compare against 10 competitive baselines adapted from the LLM literature.

</details>


### [320] [On the Push-Based Asynchronous Federated Learning: A Bias-Correction Aggregation Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26162)
*Jiahui Bai,Hai Dong,A. K. Qin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PushCen-ADFL是一个通信高效的异步去中心化联邦学习框架，通过质心表示空间耦合通信、聚合和局部稳定化，在不对称通信和延迟参与下实现稳定训练，相比基线方法准确率提升高达6%，通信成本降低80%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异步去中心化联邦学习（ADFL）面临频繁点对点通信、有向拓扑上的异步更新以及非独立同分布数据带来的通信开销过大、聚合偏差严重和模型漂移问题。

Method: 提出PushCen-ADFL框架，在共享质心表示空间中耦合通信、聚合与局部稳定化，形成压缩与优化的闭环。客户端交换质心形式消息，采用保均推求和（push-sum）混合校正聚合偏差，并使用轻量级质心正则化缓解异质性和延迟带来的漂移，同时引入有界去重缓冲区增强异步到达的鲁棒性。

Result: 在视觉数据集上，PushCen-ADFL在数据异质性下准确率提升高达6%，每次推送通信成本降低超过80%，实现了优异的精度-通信权衡。

Conclusion: PushCen-ADFL有效解决了ADFL中通信效率、聚合偏差和模型漂移三大挑战，为大规模异构系统提供了实用的去中心化联邦学习方案。

Abstract: Asynchronous decentralized federated learning (ADFL) eliminates central coordination and global synchronization, making it attractive for large-scale and heterogeneous systems. However, frequent peer-to-peer communication, asynchronous updates on directed topologies, and non-IID data jointly lead to excessive communication overhead, biased aggregation and severe model drift. We propose PushCen-ADFL, a communication-efficient ADFL framework that enables stable training under asymmetric communication and delayed client participation. PushCen-ADFL couples communication, aggregation, and local stabilization in a shared centroid representation space, forming a closed loop between compression and optimization. Clients exchange centroid-form messages, apply average-preserving push-sum mixing to correct aggregation bias, and use a lightweight centroid regularization anchored in the same centroid space to mitigate drift under heterogeneity and staleness. A bounded, sender-deduplicated buffer further improves robustness under irregular asynchronous arrivals. Experiments on vision datasets demonstrate that PushCen-ADFL improves accuracy under data heterogeneity by up to 6\% while reducing per-push communication cost by more than 80\%, achieving a favorable accuracy-communication trade-off.

</details>


### [321] [Planning Neural Dynamics with Lie Group Embedding through Supervised Projective Manifold Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26167)
*Tianwei Wang,Bryan Chen,Qian Zuo,Qiyue Xia,Xin Li,Wei Pang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出李群嵌入式动态神经网络(LieEDNN)，通过梯度下降和流形度量投影实现可学习、稳定的流形动态，解决了李群与神经网络加法不兼容及非线性表示空间两大挑战，在SE(3)机械臂实验中验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经ODE无法直接处理李群上的动态演化，因为李群与加法运算不兼容，且动态在非线性代数表示空间中演化而非欧氏空间，需要一种能够利用李群(如SO(3)、SE(3))强大表示能力且保持动力学稳定性的神经网络框架。

Method: (1) 引入李代数的伴随李群作用，产生线性映射并转化为权重矩阵的分块结构，使加法可在李代数向量空间上操作；(2) 将李代数和伴随作用参数化为线性变换，与神经网络感知机对齐；(3) 将嵌入表示为权重上的分块流形约束，开发基于梯度下降和流形度量投影的学习算法以保证动态稳定性。

Result: 在SE(3)李群和伸缩机械臂应用场景上实现实验，验证了LieEDNN能够学习具有稳定性保证的流形动态。

Conclusion: LieEDNN成功将李群嵌入神经网络，实现了在一般李群流形上的可学习、稳定动态演化，为机器人、图形学和控制领域提供了利用李群表示能力的有效工具。

Abstract: We propose Lie group embedded dynamical neural networks (LieEDNN) and the corresponding learning algorithms based on gradient descent and metric projection on smooth manifold, where we treat Lie group as an intrinsic representation for continuous symmetry of manifold geometry. Thereby we achieve learnable and stable dynamics on the underlying manifold for general Lie group, and we are able to utilize the powerful representation capability of Lie group such as SO(3) and SE(3) to solve real world engineering problems in areas such as robotics, graphics, and control. Two core challenges are: (i) General Lie groups are incompatible with addition arithmetic, which is necessary for neural network interactions. (ii) The dynamics evolve in the nonlinear representation space of special algebra rather than the normal Euclidean space, which violates the paradigm of common neural ODEs. To address these two challenges, we firstly introduce adjoint Lie group action on the Lie algebra, which induces a linear mapping and transfer to the block-wise structure of weight matrices, such that addition could operate on the Lie algebra as a vector space. Then we parameterize the Lie algebra and the adjoint action as linear transformation so that the architecture is aligned with neural network perceptrons. Explicitly, this embedding appears as block-wise manifold constraints on weights, and we develop algorithms to learn the equilibrium with stability guarantees of the temporal neural network dynamics. Experiments are implemented on a specific Lie group SE(3), with the application scenario of telescopic manipulators.

</details>


### [322] [When Rule Violations Are Rare: Chimera Training for Logical Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26171)
*Alejandro Ascarate,Leo Lebrat,Rodrigo Santa Cruz,Clinton Fookes,Olivier Salvado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种神经规则评估器，通过将语义约束编译为有向无环图、使用特征感知的子树MLP门控，并结合"嵌合体训练"（利用反事实构建生成逻辑反例），在不依赖真实异常图像的情况下，实现对稀有或缺失语义约束违规的异常检测，在CLEVRER、OpenImages、VidOR上提升了规则级异常检测AUROC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际异常不仅是稀有输入，更是对语义约束（如对象共现、动作前提、时序关系）的违反，而此类规则违规在训练中往往罕见或缺失，现有方法难以有效学习。

Method: 提出神经规则评估器：将每个约束编译为DAG，用特征感知的子树MLP门控处理内部逻辑算子；引入嵌合体训练，在特征层拼接不同样本的子树特征，通过继承原始标签并应用逻辑算子生成监督信号，提供逻辑反例。

Result: 在CLEVRER、OpenImages、VidOR上，规则级异常检测AUROC优于独立事件基线、同图像语义训练基线，尤其在组合性和关系性规则上提升显著，同时输出标量异常分数和规则级归因。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了训练中规则违规样本稀缺的问题，通过反事实特征构造生成逻辑反例，提升了语义约束违例检测能力，并具备可解释性。

Abstract: Many practical anomalies are not merely rare inputs, but violations of semantic constraints: objects co-occur in structured ways, actions imply preconditions, and events satisfy temporal or relational regularities. We study anomaly detection in this setting, where constraints are given as logical rules over learned visual concepts, but real rule violations are rare or absent during training. We propose a neural rule evaluator that compiles each constraint into a directed acyclic graph and learns feature-aware subtree MLP gates for its internal logical operators. Each gate maps child features and edge-level negations to a parent representation and a rule-satisfaction probability, with intermediate supervision obtained from exact Boolean propagation over ground-truth concept labels. The key difficulty is that same-image training data often provide insufficient coverage of informative truth configurations and also allow shortcut solutions. To address this, we introduce chimera training: an operand-level counterfactual construction at the feature level. Instead of mixing input images, we concatenate subtree features from different samples; each operand keeps the hard truth label of the sample it came from, and the chimera target is obtained by applying the node's logical operator to those inherited labels. This supplies supervised logical counterexamples without requiring real anomalous images. Across CLEVRER, OpenImages, and VidOR, the resulting evaluator improves rule-level anomaly AUROC over independent-events and same-image semantic-training baselines, especially for compositional and relational rules. The method yields both scalar anomaly scores and rule-level attributions.

</details>


### [323] [ARBITER: Reasoning Trajectory Basins and Majority Vote Failures in Test-Time Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26172)
*Meng Cai,Lars Kulik,Farhana Choudhury*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了语言模型在测试时采样生成的多条推理轨迹会聚集成少数"推理盆地"，导致多数投票选出的是最稳定的盆地而非最准确的答案，从而产生错误多数失败。作者提出ARBITER方法，通过建模盆地间相互作用来纠正这种偏差，在无需外部信息的情况下恢复了部分理论最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型测试时采样生成的推理轨迹并非独立，它们会聚集成少数"推理盆地"，多数投票因此偏向最稳定的盆地而非最准确的答案，导致正确答案被多数错误答案压制。现有方法无法有效纠正这种错误多数失败。

Method: 提出ARBITER，一个模型无关的方法。核心思想是在共识基础上添加保守的增量证据。包含两种形式：(1) ARBITER-Δ：向多数投票先验添加同模型证据；(2) ARBITER-Enc：利用完整解决方案的隐藏状态中的有界残差信号增强判断。该方法仅使用基础模型自身的采样输出、隐藏状态和推导证据，无需外部信息。

Result: 在GSM8K上用Qwen3-4B，K=24样本的共识准确率约94%，同池top-2 oracle约96%。ARBITER恢复了部分差距，无需外部信息。在三个模型家族和三个数学基准上一致提升，无净负案例。例如Llama-3.1-8B在MMLU-HS-Math上从约78%提升到约82%，恢复了约22%的oracle潜在空间。

Conclusion: 推理轨迹的盆地聚集特性导致多数投票存在系统性偏差，ARBITER通过建模盆地间相互作用，仅利用模型自身信息即可部分恢复理论最优性能，提供了一种无需外部知识的轻量级改进方案。

Abstract: When language models use test-time sampling, they generate multiple reasoning trajectories and select an answer by majority vote. We show that these trajectories are not independent: for a given question, they concentrate into a small number of clusters, or reasoning basins, each defined by a normalized final answer and the solutions that reach it. A majority vote therefore selects the most stable basin rather than the most accurate one, which creates wrong-majority failures where the correct answer is present but outvoted. We introduce ARBITER, a model-agnostic approach that models interactions between basins using only the base model's own sampled outputs, hidden states, and derived evidence. Most direct correction strategies fail; ARBITER instead uses conservative additive evidence on top of consensus. In its simplest parameter-free form, ARBITER-Δ adds same-model evidence to the majority prior, while ARBITER-Enc augments this with bounded residual signals from hidden states over complete solutions. On GSM8K with Qwen3-4B, consensus over K=24 samples achieves around the mid-94% range, while a same-pool top-2 oracle reaches around the mid-96% range. ARBITER recovers a subset of these cases using zero external information. Across three model families and three math benchmarks, it yields consistent gains with no net-negative cases; for example, on Llama-3.1-8B MMLU-HS-Math, it improves accuracy from the mid-78% range to the mid-82% range, recovering about 22% of the available oracle headroom, indicating that this headroom can be partially recovered from the sample pool itself.

</details>


### [324] [InfoQuant: Shaping Activation Distributions for Low-Bit LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26175)
*Ke Li,Dong An,Xiaoling Zang,Can Ye,Liang Xie,Qibo Qiu,Chen Shen,Xiaofei He,Wenxiao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出InfoQuant，一种无需训练的低比特激活量化方法，通过峰值抑制正交变换（PSOT）将激活分布重塑为更利于量化的形式，并在W4A4KV4设置下平均保持97%的浮点精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的低比特激活量化方法虽然抑制了离群值、平衡了通道或最小化重建误差，但未从量化器视角明确什么样的激活分布才是易于离散化的，导致数值上看似平滑但量化误差仍然很大。

Method: 从信息论角度分析量化误差，提出量化友好的激活应同时满足数值范围小且在该范围内充分分散。基于此，设计无需训练的峰值抑制正交变换（PSOT）来重塑激活分布，并引入自适应离群令牌选择以提升优化鲁棒性。

Result: 在多个LLM家族上，InfoQuant一致优于先前的PTQ和端到端训练方法。在W4A4KV4设置下，平均保持97%的浮点精度，LLaMA-2 13B的性能差距较之前最先进方法缩小42%。

Conclusion: 激活量化不应仅关注数值平滑，而应从量化器视角设计分布特征（小数值范围+充分分散）。InfoQuant通过无需训练的变换有效实现了这一目标，为LLM的低比特部署提供了新思路。

Abstract: Low-bit activation quantization remains a major bottleneck in efficient large language model (LLM) deployment. The difficulty is not only that activations contain outliers, but that their distributions are often poorly matched to a low-bit uniform quantizer. Existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods suppress peaks, balance channels, or minimize reconstruction error, yet they rarely specify what activation distribution is actually easy to discretize. As a result, activations may appear numerically smoother while still incurring large quantization error because the quantization range remains wide or most values collapse into a few levels near the mean. We recast activation transformation as quantizer-facing distribution design and analyze quantization error from an information-theoretic perspective. Our analysis shows that quantization-friendly activations should jointly have a smaller numerical range and sufficient dispersion within that range. Guided by this analysis, we propose InfoQuant, a train-free method that employs Peak Suppression Orthogonal Transformation (PSOT) to shape activations into more quantization-friendly distributions. We further introduce adaptive outlier-token selection to improve the robustness of PSOT during optimization. Across multiple LLM families, InfoQuant consistently outperforms prior PTQ and end-to-end training baselines. Under W4A4KV4, it preserves 97% of floating-point accuracy on average and reduces the LLaMA-2 13B performance gap by 42% over the previous state of the art. Code is available at [https://github.com/LLIKKE/InfoQuant](https://github.com/LLIKKE/InfoQuant)

</details>


### [325] [GAC: Noise-Aware Adaptive Mixing for Hybrid SFT-RL Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26184)
*Yuelin Hu,Zhenbo Yu,Zhengxue Cheng,Wei Liu,Li Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GAC方法，一种基于噪声感知的自适应混合训练权重控制器，在混合后训练中自动调整SFT和RL的信号比例，实验证明在多个基准上优于固定和规则基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合后训练中固定调度策略无法适应两种训练信号（SFT和RL）相对噪声随时间变化的问题。

Method: GAC：通过在线估计梯度方差和两种训练信号之间的不一致性，推导自适应混合权重；包含平滑化、先验引导和有界更新，并复用现有训练张量。

Result: 在数学、代码、科学和逻辑基准上，GAC一致优于固定和基于规则的基线，更大模型尺度上提升更显著，训练开销低于1%。

Conclusion: 噪声感知的自适应混合策略能有效提升混合后训练效果，且计算成本极低。

Abstract: Hybrid post-training usually combines supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, but fixed mixing schedules cannot adapt when the relative noise of the two signals changes over time. We propose GAC, a noise-aware controller that derives an adaptive mixing weight from online estimates of gradient variance and disagreement between the two training signals. The method adds smoothing, prior guidance, and bounded updates while reusing existing training tensors. Experiments on math, code, science, and logic benchmarks show that GAC consistently improves hybrid post-training over strong fixed and rule-based baselines, with larger gains at larger model scales and less than 1% training overhead.

</details>


### [326] [Max-Window Scale Estimation for Near-Lossless HiF8 W8A8 Quantization-Aware Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26189)
*Yingying Cheng,Jinquan Shi,Li Zhou,Zhiyang He,Zhaoyi Sun,Fan Zhang,Jie Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了低比特浮点量化训练（HiF8 W8A8）在OpenPangu-Embedded-1B模型上的两种正交失败模式：amax饱和（延迟缩放导致前向裁剪破坏知识表示）和灾难性遗忘（激进学习率覆盖预训练常识），并提出了保守最大算法DTS策略（64步历史窗口）和BF16预热（500步）+低学习率（10^{-5}）的解决方案，在MMLU、HellaSwag、ARC-Challenge上仅分别下降0.43%、0.58%、0.22%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化感知训练（QAT）在低比特浮点格式下会引入标准训练指标无法检测的隐性失败模式，亟需系统研究这些失败模式的成因与解耦方法。

Method: 通过延迟张量缩放（DTS）视角，设计八组对照实验解耦两种正交失败模式；提出保守最大算法DTS（64步历史窗口）解决amax饱和，采用500步BF16预热+lr=10^{-5}的QAT缓解灾难性遗忘。

Result: 最终配置相比BF16基线，MMLU下降0.43%，HellaSwag下降0.58%，ARC-Challenge下降0.22%，10,000步训练损失APE仅0.11%。

Conclusion: amax饱和和灾难性遗忘是HiF8 QAT中两种独立且必要的待解决问题，所提两种修复方案联合使用可显著降低性能损失，且两者缺一不可。

Abstract: Quantization-aware training (QAT) with low-bit floating-point formats enables efficient LLM deployment, yet introduces subtle failure modes invisible to standard training metrics. We present a systematic study of HiF8 W8A8 QAT for OpenPangu-Embedded-1B through the lens of Delayed Tensor Scaling (DTS). Across eight controlled experiments, we identify and disentangle two orthogonal failure modes: (i)amax saturation, where delayed scale estimates silently corrupt knowledge-sensitive representations via forward-pass clipping, and (ii)catastrophic forgetting, where an aggressive learning rate overwrites pretrained commonsense knowledge independently of quantization. Neither is detectable from training loss alone. We address amax saturation with a conservative max-algorithm DTS strategy over a 64-step history window, and mitigate forgetting via a 500-step BF16 warmup followed by QAT at lr=10^{-5}. Both fixes are necessary and sufficient: our final configuration achieves 0.43% MMLU drop, 0.58% HellaSwag drop, and 0.22% ARC-Challenge drop versus a matched BF16 baseline, with a training loss APE of only 0.11% over 10,000 steps.

</details>


### [327] [HRVConformer: Neonatal Hypoxic-Ischemic Encephalopathy Classification from the Heart Rate signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26190)
*Shuwen Yu,William P Marnane,Geraldine B. Boylan,Gordon Lightbody*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HRVConformer，一种结合卷积与Transformer的深度学习架构，用于基于瞬时心率信号对缺氧缺血性脑病（HIE）进行端到端分类。在包含1573小时心率的弱监督数据集上训练，在独立测试集上达到83.23%的AUC和74.56%的准确率，优于Transformer、ResNet50等基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统HIE分类方法依赖手工特征提取，无法充分利用心率信号中的局部与全局依赖关系，且人工标注成本高。作者希望设计一种端到端的深度学习方法，直接处理原始心率信号，提高HIE分类的准确性和自动化程度。

Method: HRVConformer采用混合架构：卷积层提取局部特征，Transformer的注意力机制建模全局依赖。使用改进的Pan-Tompkins算法从ECG中提取HR信号，结合专家标注数据（259小时）和大量弱标注数据（共1573小时）进行监督学习。

Result: 在独立215小时测试集上，HRVConformer取得AUC 83.23%、准确率74.56%，优于Transformer、ResNet50及全卷积网络等基线模型。

Conclusion: 卷积与Transformer的融合能有效增强心率信号的表示能力，为HIE的自动化评估提供了一种有前景的方案。代码已开源。

Abstract: This paper presents the HRVConformer, a novel deep learning architecture for the classification of hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy (HIE) using the instantaneous heart rate (HR) signal. Unlike conventional approaches that rely on handcrafted features, HRVConformer directly processes raw HR signals in an end-to-end manner, capturing both local and long-range dependencies through a hybrid Convolution-Transformer framework. By integrating convolutional layers for local feature extraction and Transformer-based attention mechanisms for global context modelling, the architecture effectively enhances signal representation and classification performance. The model was trained using supervised learning on a large HR dataset consisting of 1,573 one-hour epochs, including 259 one-hour expert-annotated epochs and a substantial set of weakly labelled data. A 314-hour validation set provided a robust performance estimation, while an independent 215-hour dataset with expert annotations was reserved for final testing. HR signals were extracted from electrocardiogram (ECG) recordings using an improved Pan-Tompkins algorithm, which significantly enhanced both signal quality and data availability. Experimental results demonstrate that the HRVConformer achieves an AUC of 83.23\% and accuracy of 74.56\% on the test set. These results surpass the performance of the Transformer, ResNet50 and fully convolutional networks baselines, highlighting the advantages of integrating convolutional and Transformer-based components for HR-based HIE classification. The proposed method provides a promising step toward a more accurate and automated assessment of HIE using HR signals. The code is available at: https://github.com/syu-kylin/HRVConformer.

</details>


### [328] [Modeling Dynamic Mixtures of Time-Delay Systems from Streaming Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26191)
*Ren Fujiwara,Yasuko Matsubara,Yasushi Sakurai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DelayMix框架，将流式时间序列视为时滞系统的动态混合，通过固定长度的系统摘要张量（基于马尔可夫参数序列）捕获动态行为和输入-输出延迟，并利用张量分解算法选择最优模型，从而在保持鲁棒性和低内存占用的同时实现快速自适应建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列数据流中，环境变化或输入延迟变化导致的系统快速变化（体制转换）会降低模型性能，且使用多个小模型时面临准确性、鲁棒性和内存使用之间的权衡问题。

Method: 将流式时间序列建模为时滞系统的动态混合；通过马尔可夫参数序列构建固定长度的系统摘要张量，同时捕获动态行为和延迟特征；必要时使用张量分解算法从张量中提取相关历史模型，选择最适合当前体制的系统。

Result: 在真实数据集上，DelayMix始终优于其他方法，实现了更优的预测准确性和更快的延迟适应能力，尤其是在高度非平稳数据上表现突出。

Conclusion: 该方法能够快速适应环境变化，计算效率高，在准确性和鲁棒性之间取得了良好平衡，同时有效控制了内存使用。

Abstract: This research addresses the problem of adaptive modeling in time-series data streams with clear input-output relationships. This problem is challenging because rapid system changes (regime shifts) caused by environmental factors or input delay changes degrade model performance, and the trade-off among accuracy, robustness, and memory usage arises when using multiple small models for each time-series pattern. To address these issues, this paper presents an online framework/method that treats streaming time series as dynamic mixtures of time-delay systems. This framework maintains robustness of model tracking and reduces memory usage by summarizing past regimes using a fixed-length representation that captures both the system dynamics and input-output delays. Concretely, this approach constructs a summary system tensor using the system's Markov parameter series, capturing both dynamic behavior and delay characteristics. If necessary, a tensor decomposition algorithm extracts relevant past models from the tensor and helps select the system that best fits the current regime. This method enables rapid adaptation to environmental changes and is computationally efficient. Tests on real datasets show that DelayMix consistently outperforms other methods, achieving superior forecast accuracy and faster adaptation to delays, especially for highly non-stationary data.

</details>


### [329] [Co-folding model guided by structural proteomics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26192)
*Alon Shtrikman,Nitzan Simchi,Michal Ran Shchory,Sagie Brodsky,Eran Seger,Kirill Pevzner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AIMS-Fold是一个利用交联质谱（XL-MS）和氢氘交换质谱（HDX-MS）数据引导蛋白质扩散模型生成过程的框架，在诱导邻近靶标的结构预测上优于纯计算方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的蛋白质结构生成模型能预测单个蛋白质静态结构，但无法准确捕获蛋白质复合物的正确构象状态，这对于抗体和PROTAC等诱导邻近模态的药物设计至关重要。虽然结构蛋白质组学技术XL-MS和HDX-MS能提供有价值的结构和动力学信息，但如何将这些稀疏、异质的测量数据整合到生成模型中仍是一个未解决的挑战。

Method: 提出AIMS-Fold框架，是一种推理时引导扩散方法。在预训练扩散模型的生成过程中，利用从XL-MS空间约束和HDX-MS溶剂可及性特征推导出的可微物理势能，主动引导采样轨迹。

Result: XL-MS和HDX-MS数据单独使用均能提升预测精度，二者整合产生协同改进效果。在具有挑战性的诱导邻近靶标上，AIMS-Fold的准确率优于完全依赖计算的无引导状态最先进模型（如Boltz-2）。

Conclusion: AIMS-Fold建立了将实验结构蛋白质组学数据与预训练扩散模型相结合的整合计算框架，为诱导邻近药物的基于结构的药物设计提供了强大工具。

Abstract: Protein structure generative models excel at predicting single protein static structures from sequence, but routinely fail to capture the correct conformational state of protein complexes, critical for protein design and induced proximity modalities such as antibodies and PROTACs. While structural proteomics techniques like Cross-Linking Mass Spectrometry (XL-MS) and Hydrogen-Deuterium Exchange (HDX-MS) offer valuable spatial and dynamic insights, integrating these sparse, heterogeneous measurements into these models remains an open challenge. Here, we bridge this gap by combining structural proteomics data with the rich biophysical priors learned by pretrained diffusion models. We introduce AIMS-Fold, an inference-time guided-diffusion framework that actively steers the generative sampling trajectory using differentiable physical potentials derived from XL-MS spatial restraints and HDX-MS solvent accessibility profiles. We demonstrate that these structural methods individually enhance predictive accuracy, and their integration yields synergistic improvement. Crucially, by leveraging these experimental restraints, AIMS-Fold achieves higher accuracy on challenging induced proximity targets than purely computational, unguided state-of-the-art models like Boltz-2. This establishes our framework as a powerful, integrative computational approach for the structure based drug design of induced proximity drugs. Evaluation code will be made publicly available upon publication.

</details>


### [330] [Bridging Classification and Reconstruction: Cooperative Time Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26193)
*Qideng Tang,Dai Chaofan,Wubin Ma,Yahui Wu,Haohao Zhou,Tao Zhang,Huan Li,Dalin Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CoAD框架，通过统一分类（Outlier Exposure）和重建（Masked Autoencoder）两种范式，利用概率软掩码机制实现协同检测，在时间序列异常检测中显著优于现有方法，且轻量高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以检测微妙和长期的异常；Outlier Exposure（分类范式）泛化性差，Masked Autoencoder（重建范式）存在掩码对齐问题。两种范式各有优劣，亟需一种能融合两者优势、弥补各自缺陷的统一框架。

Method: 提出CoAD框架，包含两个协同模块：(1) 分类模块生成概率驱动的软掩码，指导重建模块的关注区域；(2) 重建模块利用软掩码进行更精准的异常重建，同时反向缓解分类模块的泛化问题。分类模块还针对分类粒度不当和频率信息缺失进行了专门设计。

Result: 在高质量基准数据集上、严格评估协议下，CoAD显著优于最先进的深度学习和传统数据挖掘方法；同时模型轻量，速度远超现有SOTA方法，适用于大规模实时应用。

Conclusion: CoAD通过分类与重建范式的协同设计，有效解决了各自方法的根本局限，证明了深度学习在TSAD任务中的巨大潜力，并为实际工业应用提供了高效可行的方案。

Abstract: Time series anomaly detection (TSAD) has long been a hot research topic in data mining due to its various applications. Recent studies challenge the effectiveness of popular deep learning methods for TSAD, suggesting their failure in detecting subtle and prolonged anomalies. Outlier Exposure (OE) and Masked Autoencoder (MAE) emerge as two promising paradigms (classification and reconstruction) for solving the above problems. However, OE-based methods are constrained by poor generalization, while MAE-based methods are limited by masking misalignment issues. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a novel framework, CoAD, which unifies the two paradigms to leverage their complementary strengths while mitigating their respective weaknesses. In this framework, the classification module generates probability-informed soft masks for the reconstruction module, which in turn alleviates the generalization problem of the classification module. This cooperative design enables CoAD to effectively detect subtle and complex anomalies that are often overlooked by existing methods. Additionally, the classification module is carefully designed to resolve issues related to improper classification granularity and the neglect of frequency information. Extensive experiments on high-quality benchmark datasets, conducted under rigorous evaluation protocols, demonstrate that CoAD significantly outperforms both state-of-the-art deep learning and traditional data mining methods, highlighting the potential of deep learning in TSAD. Moreover, CoAD is lightweight and substantially faster than existing SOTA methods, demonstrating its practical value for large-scale, real-time applications.

</details>


### [331] [On the Role of Inductive Bias in Time-Series Pretraining: A Case Study in Learning Generalizable Representations for Clinical Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26194)
*Sharmita Dey,Diego Paez-Granados*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PathoFM，一种用于脊髓损伤病理步态分析的编码器中心Transformer，通过三种互补目标（局部补全、时间连续性、无监督上下文动态）的预训练，实现了跨分类和回归任务的有效迁移，并发现动态中心的目标组合能产生最平衡的迁移效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床时间序列学习受限于小规模异质队列和协议漂移，而下游任务涵盖分类和回归两大类。现有预训练目标缺乏对跨任务类型迁移能力的研究，需要探索应该施加何种归纳偏置以使表征在不同任务类型和受试者间有效迁移。

Method: 构建PathoFM编码器中心Transformer，在多元步态窗口上使用三种互补预训练目标：1)局部补全（重构连续掩码片段以学习局部结构）；2)时间连续性（从观测前缀预测掩码中间时段以学习平滑性和因果一致性）；3)无监督上下文动态（基于受试者示例窗口通过注意力机制进行支持-查询重构）。

Result: 对比三类目标家族（分组/对比、动态基、生成式重构），动态中心的目标组合产生最平衡的迁移效果。分组目标有利于判别边界但损害连续目标所需的幅度保真度；纯重构目标保留波形结构但在分类上表现不足。

Conclusion: 结合局部重构与时间连续性，并在可获得示例时添加上下文条件化，能够产生稳健的受试者泛化表征。

Abstract: Clinical time-series learning is routinely constrained by small, heterogeneous cohorts and protocol drift, while its downstream use spans both classification (e.g., pathology diagnosis) and regression (e.g., temporal forecasting). These constraints make foundation-model pretraining appealing, but raises an important question of which inductive biases should the pretraining objective impose so that representations transfer across task types and subjects. We study this question in pathological gait analysis for spinal cord injury (SCI) via PathoFM, an encoder-centric transformer pretrained on multivariate gait windows with three complementary objectives: Local Completion (reconstruct contiguous masked spans to enforce local structure), Temporal Continuity (predict a masked mid-horizon continuation from an observed prefix to enforce smoothness and causal consistency), and Unsupervised In-Context Dynamics (support-query reconstruction conditioned on subject exemplar windows via attention). Empirically comparing objective families (grouping/contrastive, dynamics-based, and generative reconstruction), we find that dynamics-centric mixtures produce the most balanced transfer: grouping objectives favor discriminative margins but can degrade magnitude fidelity needed for continuous targets, whereas reconstruction-only objectives preserve waveform structure but may underperform on classification. Overall, combining local reconstruction with temporal continuity, and adding in-context conditioning when exemplar access is realistic, yields robust subject-generalizing representations.

</details>


### [332] [From Privacy to Generalization: Linear Max-Information Bounds for DP-SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26222)
*Christoph H. Lampert,Hossein Zakerinia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了DP-SGD的近似最大信息界具有与数据集大小线性相关的缩放性质，并基于此推导出PAC-Bayes泛化界和DP-SGD训练模型的显式泛化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解泛化与隐私之间的关系是机器学习理论的核心挑战，尤其对于DP-SGD训练的深度网络，该问题目前仍是一个开放难题。

Method: 通过证明DP-SGD的有限样本近似最大信息界，其缩放性质与经典差分隐私算法相当（至多与数据集大小线性相关）。

Result: 获得了两个主要结果：1) 可学习先验的通用PAC-Bayes泛化界；2) DP-SGD训练模型自身的显式泛化界，复杂度项由优化超参数完全控制。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了隐私与泛化理论之间的差距，为DP-SGD提供了理论保证，同时揭示了优化超参数对泛化复杂度的直接影响。

Abstract: Understanding the relationship between generalization and privacy remains a central challenge in modern machine learning theory, particularly for deep networks trained by variants of differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD). In this work we make progress on this persistent open problem by proving a finite-sample bound on the approximate max-information of DP-SGD that exhibits scaling properties comparable with (Dwork et al, 2015)'s classic result for $ε$-differentially private algorithms, namely at most linear in the dataset size. From our result we obtain a general-purpose PAC-Bayes generalization bound in which the necessary prior distribution can be learned by DP-SGD, as well as a generalization bound for DP-SGD-trained models themselves, with a complexity term that is fully explicit and controlled by the optimization hyperparameters.

</details>


### [333] [Provably Communication-Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Federated Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26243)
*Zhishuai Guo,Wenhan Wu,Chen Chen,Lei Zhang,Olivera Kotevska,Ravi K Madduri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CE-FedGNN 提出了一种通信高效且保护隐私的联邦图神经网络框架，通过低频交换聚合节点表示、移动平均估计器处理跨客户端依赖和过时性，并采用度量差分隐私提供有意义的隐私保证，在合成反洗钱基准和引文网络上实现了强性能与低通信成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦GNN方法要么忽略跨客户端链接导致精度下降，要么需要频繁交换嵌入向量造成高通信和隐私成本。需要一种既能利用跨客户端链接信息又能高效通信且保护隐私的联邦图学习方法。

Method: 1) 不共享原始数据或逐轮嵌入，而是低频交换聚合的节点表示；2) 引入移动平均估计器持续跟踪节点表示，实现跨轮稳定复用；3) 采用度量差分隐私（metric-DP）框架，基于嵌入空间距离衡量隐私损失，在标准DP过于保守的情况下提供有意义的保证。

Result: 以 $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ 的速率收敛到稳定点，通信复杂度为 $O(T^{3/4})$；推导了 $(\varepsilon,\delta)$-metric-DP 保证；在合成银行间反洗钱基准和引文网络上实现强性能，显著降低通信开销，并在隐私噪声下保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CE-FedGNN 成功在耦合图的联邦学习中实现了通信效率、隐私保护和模型性能之间的良好平衡，为跨组织图数据联邦学习提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance on relational data, but real-world graphs are often distributed across organizations that cannot share raw data due to privacy and policy constraints. Existing federated GNN methods either ignore cross-client links, leading to degraded accuracy, or require frequent embedding exchanges, incurring substantial communication and privacy costs. We propose CE-FedGNN, a communication-efficient and privacy-preserving federated GNN framework for learning over such coupled graphs. Our approach avoids sharing raw data or per-round embeddings by infrequently exchanging aggregated node representations. To handle cross-client dependency and staleness, we introduce a moving-average estimator that continuously tracks node representations and enables their stable reuse across rounds. To provide formal privacy guarantees for the released representations, we adopt the metric differential privacy (metric-DP) framework, which measures privacy with respect to distances in the learned embedding space rather than worst-case input perturbations. This yields meaningful guarantees at noise levels where standard differential privacy becomes overly conservative. We establish convergence to a stationary point at a rate of $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ with $O(T^{3/4})$ communication complexity. In addition, we derive $(\varepsilon,δ)$-metric-DP guarantees via Rényi differential privacy composition under a public-cohort threat model. Experiments on synthetic interbank anti-money laundering benchmarks and citation networks demonstrate that CE-FedGNN achieves strong performance while significantly reducing communication and maintaining robustness under privacy-preserving noise.

</details>


### [334] [The Bridge-Garden Dilemma in LLM Distillation: Why Mixing Hard and Soft Labels Works](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26246)
*Guanghui Wang,Kaiwen Lv Kacuila,Zhiyong Yang,Zitai Wang,Jin-Wen Wu,Longtao Huang,Qianqian Xu,Qingming Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Bridge-Garden分解理论，通过混合硬标签和软标签的知识蒸馏方法，有效减少语言模型的暴露偏差，在推理和编码任务上超越现有基线，同时降低9.7倍训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识蒸馏中，软标签看似信息更丰富，但混合硬标签和软标签效果更好。作者发现这一提升并非来自更好的教师匹配，而是源于减少了暴露偏差（训练与推理分布之间的不匹配）。

Method: 提出Bridge-Garden分解理论，将生成步骤分为两类：Bridge（下一token必须精确）和Garden（下一token可以灵活）。基于此设计混合监督方法，自适应平衡硬标签和软标签。在7组师生模型对（Qwen、Llama、Gemma、DeepSeek）上进行实验。

Result: 混合策略在推理和编码基准上优于基于散度的蒸馏和on-policy KD基线，训练成本降低9.7倍。

Conclusion: 硬标签在Bridge步骤中避免风险偏差，软标签在Garden步骤中保持多样性，混合策略有效减少暴露偏差，实现高效模型压缩。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers knowledge from a large teacher model to a smaller student. In language modeling, the student is trained either on tokens sampled from the teacher (hard labels) or the teacher's full next-token distribution (soft labels). Despite soft labels appear strictly richer, we find that mixing hard and soft labels consistently yields better results. Crucially, we show that this gain cannot be explained by closer teacher matching during training. Instead, it comes from reduced exposure bias, the mismatch between training and inference distributions. To explain this phenomenon, we introduce the Bridge-Garden Decomposition theory, which categorizes generation steps into two types: Bridges, where the next token must be exact, and Gardens, where it can be flexible. We show that hard-only KD excels in Bridges by avoiding risky deviations, while soft-only KD preserves diversity in Gardens. A hybrid strategy handles both cases and, as a result, reduces exposure bias across the sequence. Guided by this theory, we develop a family of Bridge-Garden hybrid supervision methods that adaptively balance hard and soft labels. Across a primary suite of seven teacher-student pairs (including Qwen, Llama, Gemma, and DeepSeek) and benchmarks in reasoning and coding, our approach outperforms divergence-based and on-policy KD baselines while reducing training cost by 9.7x, enabling efficient model compression. Code is available at https://github.com/ghwang-s/bridge_garden_hybrid_kd_release.

</details>


### [335] [Quantized Keys Steal Attention: Bias Correction for KV-Cache Compression in Video Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26266)
*Tuna Tuncer,Felix Becker,Thomas Pfeil*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种针对视频扩散模型中KV缓存量化导致的注意力偏差（Jensen bias）的校正方法，通过逐注意力分数的期望修正，在INT2量化下恢复接近BF16的视频质量，且内存减半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分块自回归视频扩散模型依赖KV缓存避免重复计算，但缓存随视频变长成为内存瓶颈。低比特量化虽能减少内存占用，却带来视频质量下降，需解决该矛盾。

Method: 理论推导发现量化噪声因softmax中指数的凸性导致缓存键注意力被高估（Jensen bias），据此设计逐注意力分数的在线校正项，利用缓存键量化步长和查询范数计算，基于二阶泰勒近似实现计算开销可忽略。

Result: 在MAGI-1、SkyReels-V2、HY-WorldPlay上采用INT2量化，校正后质量接近BF16，优于INT4且内存减少50%。

Conclusion: 所提校正方法有效消除量化引起的注意力偏差，在极低比特量化下实现高质量视频生成，为长视频模型的内存效率优化提供实用方案。

Abstract: Chunk-wise autoregressive video diffusion models rely on a KV cache of previously generated chunks to avoid redundant computation, but this cache quickly becomes a memory bottleneck as videos grow longer. Methods that quantize the KV cache to low bitwidths reduce memory pressure but degrade video quality. We show that a key driver of this degradation is a systematic bias in attention weights: due to the convexity of the exponential in softmax attention, quantization noise inflates the contribution of cached keys, a phenomenon we call the Jensen bias. This effect causes quantized keys to steal attention mass from the unquantized current chunk. We derive a per-attention-score correction that removes this bias in expectation, computed on the fly from the quantization step sizes of the cached keys and the query norm. Using a second-order Taylor approximation, the additional computational overhead is negligible, and no additional memory is needed alongside the cache. Evaluated on MAGI-1, SkyReels-V2, and HY-WorldPlay at INT2 quantization, our correction recovers most of the quality lost to aggressive quantization, reaching near-BF16 video quality, and can outperform INT4 quantization while using 50% less memory.

</details>


### [336] [Scaling World-Model Reinforcement Learning Through Diffusion Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26282)
*Xiaoyuan Cheng,Wenxuan Yuan,Zhancun Mu,Yuanzhao Zhang,Yiming Yang,Hai Wang,Zhuo Sun,Che Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MBDPO框架，通过扩散策略表示统一世界模型中的搜索（Search）与策略优化（Policy Optimization），解决现有方法中搜索与价值学习之间的结构错位问题，在多种设置下展现出良好的扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于世界模型的强化学习方法除了模型偏差和误差累积问题外，还存在一个更关键但未被充分研究的瓶颈：搜索（Search）与价值学习（Value Learning）之间存在结构错位——策略改进依赖非搜索策略诱导的价值函数，导致训练不一致和次优学习。

Method: 提出MBDO框架：1）将策略优化重新表述为潜在世界模型中搜索轨迹上的扩散过程；2）从收集的数据集中提取隐式能量函数来锚定策略；3）通过扩散模型微调得分场以实现策略优化，同时缓解结构错位问题。

Result: 在多任务离线预训练、在线学习和离线到在线微调等多种设置下均取得优异效果；在离线大规模数据集预训练中，模型容量增加时性能呈现一致且单调的提升。

Conclusion: MBDPO通过扩散策略有效统一了搜索与策略优化，释放了世界模型在可扩展策略学习方面的潜力，且在大规模设定下展现出良好的扩展行为。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) can be effectively supported at scale through the use of world models. However, in practice, scaling such approaches remains fundamentally limited. A commonly recognized challenge is model bias and error compounding, which degrade long-horizon predictions.
